name: enterprise-e2e-test-platform
description: Production-ready end-to-end test platform for microservices

scripts.test: npm run test:ui && npm run test:api && npm run test:kafka && npm run test:security && npm run test:observability
scripts.test:ui: cd test-platform && npx playwright test tests/ui --reporter=html
scripts.test:ui:debug: cd test-platform && npx playwright test tests/ui --debug
scripts.test:performance: cd test-platform && k6 run tests/performance/load-test.js --out json=results.json
scripts.report:allure: cd test-platform && allure generate allure-results -o allure-report --clean
scripts.clean: rm -rf test-platform/allure-results test-platform/allure-report test-platform/playwright-report coverage test-platform/coverage logs screenshots
scripts.docs:
echo '
📚 DOCUMENTATION GUIDE
' && echo '📖 Core Test Docs:' && echo '  - README.md (Overview & Quick Start)' && echo '  - DEVELOPMENT_GUIDE.md (Writing & Running Tests)' && echo '  - TESTING_PATTERNS.md (Design Patterns)' && echo '  - API_DOCUMENTATION.md (API Reference)' && echo '  - PERFORMANCE_TESTING_GUIDE.md (Load Testing Guide)' && echo '  - TROUBLESHOOTING.md (Common Issues)' && echo '  - CONTRIBUTING.md (Extension Guide)'

author: Enterprise QA Team
